channel.title: Archives on Trace in Time
channel.description: Recent content in Archives on Trace in Time

item.title: Amsterdam 2024, May
item.description: Some random snapshots my friend and I captured during our last trip to Amsterdam! 🌍📸

item.title: Trace Zero
item.description: A new year is approaching. I can’t believe it’s 2025 already. I mean, my memory is still stuck in 2020. But yeah, what can we do except celebrate?
